title: Ordinance Repealing Section 2 Paragraph (r) of Ordinance No. 2020-2001, "an Ordinance Adopting the Inter-agency Task Force Resolution No. 2020-003 Dated March 29, 2020 "resolution Prescribing Covid-19 Guidelines, Policies and Regulations and Providing Penalties for Violation And/or Non-compliance Therewith".
